title: Munchables - REKT
relevance_summary: Manipulation of storage slots followed by large withdrawal on upgradeable proxy contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades an upgradeable proxy contract and then immediately withdraws large amounts of funds

red_flags: Immediate large withdrawal after contract upgrade
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades an upgradeable proxy contract and then immediately withdraws large amounts of funds
summary: The Munchables exploit involved manipulating storage slots to assign a large Ether balance to the attacker before upgrading the contract and withdrawing the funds. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring upgrades followed by large withdrawals.
